name: floatLoop
purpose: Gentle, endless floating for decorative elements — continuous looping motion along one axis (compositor-friendly).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-floatLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-floatLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: translate{{css params.axis}}(0) } to { transform: translate{{css params.axis}}(-{{css params.distance}}) } }
